name: skeleton-card
title: SkeletonCard
description: A loading-placeholder card — a glass Surface with an optional thumbnail block and a stack of text bars, swept by a frame-driven shimmer band. The 'still generating / not loaded yet' state before content populates. Rises in on the house spring; the shimmer loops so the placeholder feels live.
pickWhen: the "still generating" beat before content lands — AI loading, dashboard pre-load. Cut to real content with `cross-fade` or `morph`.
